criteria.label: Scaffold a new project in `src/` layout from scratch.
Migrate an existing flat-layout project to `src/`.
criteria.example: `git mv mypkg src/mypkg`, add `where = ['src']`, delete top-level copy, update CI to `pip install -e . && pytest`, verify in a fresh venv.

criteria.label: Configure `pyproject.toml` for at least two backends (setuptools and one of hatch/poetry-core).
criteria.example: Author equivalent `[tool.setuptools.packages.find] where = ['src']` and `[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel] packages = ['src/myapp']` declarations.

criteria.label: Explain why tests pass locally but fail in CI under flat layout, and how `src/` prevents it.
criteria.example: Diagnose a `ModuleNotFoundError: helpers` in CI as a `tests/`-on-sys.path artefact; demonstrate the same code post-migration installs cleanly and reproduces the failure locally.

criteria.label: Verify wheel contents match expectations.
criteria.example: Run `python -m build && unzip -l dist/myapp-*.whl` and check that `myapp/` (not `src/myapp/`) appears and tests are excluded.

criteria.label: Decide when *not* to adopt `src/`.
criteria.example: For a single-file `tools/csv-clean.py` with no tests, recognise `src/` is overhead; for a multi-module library with CI, recognise it's required.
